en.extract:
Fraser's forest flycatcher (Fraseria ocreata), also known as the African forest-flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.  It is found throughout the intra-tropical rainforest of Sub-Saharan Africa.

'''Fraser's forest flycatcher''' ('''''Fraseria ocreata'''''), also known as the '''African forest-flycatcher''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].  It is found throughout the intra-[[tropical forest|tropical rainforest]] of [[Sub-Saharan Africa]].
